content_body: This house was amazingly perfect for a group of friends celebrating a birthday. The town is so charming but the highlight was this beautiful home. The house was spotless, perfectly located, and truly beautiful. The kitchen had everything we needed. We sat on the decks and in the treehouse, looked at the beautiful views, and truly enjoyed ourselves. We ate -  we drank - we played games - we laughed!! We are all planning on coming back with our families and staying here.
title: The Perfect Girls Trip
